projections_realistic.note: Based on verified SERP positions showing affiliates at pos 1-5 for 75% of queries. Using 6% CTR for brand comparison/review queries where affiliates hold top 3.

dominant_competitors: cncrouterinfo.com (dedicated CNC, appears in 4+ SERPs, position 1-2)
verified_rankability.key_finding: CNC niche IS viable for affiliates, contrary to yesterday's assessment. Dedicated sites (cncrouterinfo.com, bestcncmachines.com) rank position 1 for product reviews and brand comparisons. The weak spots are generic 'best X for Y material' queries where generic farms still dominate. Strategy: prioritize product reviews and brand comparisons over material-specific listicles.
